title: Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe
description: Simple mod that re-adds the Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe from the old versions of Minecraft.
body:
# Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe
Simple mod that adds the Enchanted Golden Apple recipe from the old versions.

- 8 Gold Block
- 1 Apple
#
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mK401xVd/images/9c395c58f7af625a5a3cff9a84c7d8f5fb6f0ce3.png)
